Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0824 "CYBERNOID-0824" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cybernoid.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the JSR $48E3 instruction at $805D to be JSR $3EC0 instead 2. Added a small routine at $3EC0 which calls the subroutine at $4950 to check for keyboard input. It then checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it skips past the highscore or credit screens as if 1 is pressed. This routine waits for the fire button to be released before returning, so that it only skips one step at a time. 3. Patched the JSR $4950 instruction at $83D6 to be JSR $3EA0 instead 4. Added a small routine at $3EA0 which calls the subroutine at $4950 to check for keyboard input. It then checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if 1 is pressed and start the game. This routine differs slightly from the routine placed at $3EA0 in that it does not wait for the fire button to be released before returning.
Note: the space used for the two small routines added above contained some left over sourcecode from the development process of the original game, so could be safely overwritten.
The loading screen by Stephen Robertson (SIR) was obtained from CSDb.
